campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 19, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met on May 19, 2026 to discuss staffing issues at the city and hold a public hearing on government matters. The council also mentioned the Boogie Festival happening that weekend.
keyTopics: Staffing vacancies and recruitment/retention efforts
Public hearing on government code section 3502 matters
Boogie Festival this weekend

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — May 6, 2026
saratoga.summary: The Saratoga City Council approved an engineer's report for the fiscal year and moved forward with a public hearing process for a new ordinance scheduled for final adoption on May 20th. The council also discussed whether the city should explore becoming a charter city and reviewed preliminary tax and revenue options.
keyTopics: Engineer's Report approval for fiscal year
Public hearing process and ordinance adoption timeline
Exploring charter city status for Saratoga
Preliminary tax and revenue options under consideration

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — June 2, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on June 2, 2026, to approve routine meeting minutes, confirm a new youth commissioner, and set up the November general election for three open positions. The council also approved a new housing development map, renewed a software service contract with Accela, and authorized various agreements for building permits and budget spending.
keyTopics: November 3, 2026 general municipal election scheduled for three town council seats
New youth commissioner approved by selection committee
Tract 10675 Boulevard development project approved
Five-year software agreement with Accela for permit and planning services
Budget and spending authorizations for town operations

san-jose.title: San José City Council — June 2, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council met on June 2, 2026, to approve routine meeting minutes and address budgets and fees for two business improvement districts. The council reviewed fiscal year 2026-2027 plans for the Alum Rock Santa Clara Street and Alameda business districts, including their budgets and planned assessment increases on property owners.
keyTopics: Alum Rock Santa Clara Street Business Improvement District budget and assessment changes for 2026-2027
Alameda Business Improvement District budget and assessment changes for 2026-2027
Public hearing scheduled on property assessment levies
Approval of previous council and committee meeting minutes

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — June 2, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council held a meeting on June 2, 2026 that included both in-person and virtual participation options. Residents were able to join online via Zoom or phone to provide public comments on agenda items.
keyTopics: Virtual meeting access available via Zoom and phone dial-in
Public comment procedures for online participants (raise hand feature or *9 on phone)
Unmuting instructions for phone participants (*6 to unmute when called to speak)

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — June 2, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held a special meeting on June 2, 2026, with two separate sessions. The first was a closed-door session where council members discussed confidential matters, followed by a public special meeting later that evening with items designated as special orders of the day.
keyTopics: Closed session held at 5:30 P.M. (specific topics not publicly disclosed)
Special order of the day items discussed at 6:30 P.M. public meeting

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — June 1, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council held a legislative review meeting on June 1, 2026, to approve minutes from an April meeting and receive updates on city legislative matters. Residents were given time to speak on any topics within the committee's authority, with each speaker limited to 3 minutes.
keyTopics: Approval of April 6, 2026 Legislative Review Committee minutes
Public comment period on legislative matters
Legislative update briefing

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — June 1, 2026
santa-clara.summary: Santa Clara's City Council is holding meetings for a Stadium Neighborhood Relations Ad Hoc Subcommittee to discuss issues affecting the neighborhood around the stadium. Residents can participate in person or remotely via Zoom or phone, and can submit written comments by email.
keyTopics: Stadium Neighborhood Relations Ad Hoc Subcommittee meetings
In-person and remote participation options via Zoom and phone
Written public comment submission process (email by 10 a.m. one day prior)

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — April 7, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council met to approve routine administrative items and discuss how the city plans to spend federal housing and community development funds over the next year. They also considered changes to how the city fills vacant council seats.
keyTopics: Updates to the city's 2025-2026 plan for federal housing and community development funding
Changes to the council vacancy process and procedures
New workplan requests from individual council members
Approval of previous meeting minutes and scheduling of future meetings

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — May 6, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council held a full-day meeting covering planning updates, public safety reports from police and fire departments, a new fee schedule for the upcoming fiscal year, and infrastructure projects. The council reviewed development proposals, emergency services operations, and capital improvement plans for city facilities and services.
keyTopics: Planning and Development Services updates (Pages 337-352)
Police and Fire Department reports and operations (Pages 353-367, 245-258)
FY 2027 Municipal Fee Schedule changes
Capital Improvement Program and infrastructure projects
Emergency Services operations review (Pages 313-322)
